title: ciminalis × digenea
intro: Ciminalis × digenea, also known as Yellow Gentian, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Ciminalis and Gentiana genera. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and liver disorders. The health benefits of Ciminalis × digenea include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function. Herbal preparations of Ciminalis × digenea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
